info.title: API
info.description:
### REST Routes is following REST standard (Richardson level 3)
Detailed specification

**List:** - \`GET //\` - Get the list of **** as admin - \`GET /user///\` - Get the list of **** for a given **** - Output a **403** if logged user is not **** **Detail:** - \`GET //\` - Get the detail for **** of id **** - Output a **404** if not found - \`GET /user///\` - Get the list of **** for a given **user_id** - Output a **404** if not found - Output a **403** if: - Logged user is not **** - The **** have no access to **** **Creation / Edition / Replacement / Suppression:** - \`\` is: - **POST** for creation - **PATCH** for update (one or more fields) - **PUT** for replacement (all fields, not used) - **DELETE** for suppression (all fields, not used) - \` //\` - Create **** with id **** as admin - Output a **400** if **** conflicts with existing **** - \` /user///\` - Create **** with id **** as a given **user_id** - Output a **409** if **** conflicts with existing **** - Output a **403** if: - Logged user is not **** - The **** have no access to ****

tags.name: Default
tags.description: Default endpoints that are included with Better Auth by default. These endpoints are not part of any plugin.

200.description: Update current member organization. (Member only, requires organization.update)

200.description:
Get list of organizations. (Admin only, requires organization.view).
    Search ('q') matches name, email, phone, region, city, address.

204.description:
Ban organization. (Admin only, requires organization.ban).
    If the organization is already banned, this endpoint will throw an error.
    Banning an organization will also ban all its members.

400.description: Bad Request

401.description: Unauthorized

403.description: Forbidden

204.description:
Unban organization. (Admin only, requires organization.unban).
    If the organization is not banned, this endpoint will throw an error.
    Unbanning an organization will also unban all its members.

post.description: Use this endpoint to verify phone number

disableSession.description: Disable session creation after verification. Eg: false

updatePhoneNumber.description: Check if there is a session and update the phone number. Eg: true

status.description: Indicates if the verification was successful

token.description: Session token if session is created, null if disableSession is true or no session is created

phoneNumberVerified.description: Whether the phone number is verified

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user was last updated

user.description: User object with phone number details, null if no user is created or found

400.description: Invalid OTP

post.description: Request OTP for password reset via phone number

200.description: OTP sent successfully for password reset

status.description: Indicates if the OTP was sent successfully

post.description: Reset password using phone number OTP

otp.description: The one time password to reset the password. Eg: "123456"

phoneNumber.description: The phone number to the account which intends to reset the password for. Eg: "+1234567890"

status.description: Indicates if the password was reset successfully
